rankings.reason: Provides the most comprehensive, structured, and professional step-by-step guide while adhering to all prompt requirements.
Offers a clear, logical flow for the departure process, though it lacks the professional tone of Option A.
Fails to include the required Part 2 advice section and focuses on arrival rather than departure procedures.
Lacks a structured step-by-step guide and provides vague, unhelpful advice for navigating a major airport.
